headline: This Akamai Technologies Analyst Is No Longer Bullish; Here Are Top 5 Downgrades For Thursday

headline: Is It Time To Reconsider Expand Energy (EXE) After The Recent Share Price Pullback
summary: Wondering whether Expand Energy at around US$106 per share still offers value, or if most of the opportunity is already priced in? This article focuses squarely on what that price might represent. The stock is down 6.9% over the last week and 2.3% over the past month, with returns of 3.4% lower year to date and 4.0% lower over the past year, even after a 51.9% gain over three years and a 197.2% gain over five years. Recent coverage has focused on how Expand Energy fits within the broader...
